IncidentCategory: Inquiry / Help
IncidentSubcategory: External Application
AssigneeEmail: paul.martin@example.com
ExecutionDetails: The incident was categorized as 'Inquiry / Help' under the
subcategory 'External Application' because the issue involved
a third-party CRM software crashing on launch. Based on the
categorization, the on-duty assignee email was determined
to be paul.martin@example.com.
extraction.description: This screenshot shows UiPath Agent Builder in Studio Web after testing the ServiceNow Incidents Management Agent. The left Execution Trace panel displays the sequence of steps taken by the agent, including LLM calls, a context grounding tool call to ServiceNow_Incidents_Categorization_Information, and a tool call to SNOW_Assignee_Lookup_Automation. The right Agent output panel is on the Result tab and shows the final structured output with a valid category, subcategory, assignee email, and execution details.
extraction.step_instructions: Informational screenshot — no user action required. It shows the completed test run and execution trace, confirming that the agent used the context source and the assignee lookup tool before producing the final categorization result.

layout.rationale: High density (756 chars) + wide (3.78) or very high text
